name: ledgerpulse
description: Explainable financial behaviour and anomaly-aware mini ledger

scripts.build: npm run build -w @ledgerpulse/domain && npm run build -w @ledgerpulse/contracts && npm run build -w @ledgerpulse/api && npm run build -w @ledgerpulse/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @ledgerpulse/api" "npm run dev -w @ledgerpulse/web"
scripts.db:seed: npm run build -w @ledgerpulse/domain && npm run prisma:seed -w @ledgerpulse/api
